message.content:
@startuml
title AudioFileHeader_accessory

participant "AudioFileHeader" as AFH #D3E5F8#041927##Black
participant "AudioFileHeader_accessory" as AFA #B6CDEA#041927##WhiteSmoke
participant "AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter" as Presenter #FFFFFF#041927##LightGray

AFH ->> AFA : 1 audio id\nactivate AFA
    activate AFA
    
    AFA->>Presenter: 2 audio_id \nactivate Presenter 
        note right of Presenter: edit sample and delete sample dialogs as render functions
        
            opt [if route is \"Quick Save\"]\nnote left of Presenter: assign sample dialog as render function
            
                loop for each item in list
                
                    return
                    
                endloop    
                
            
        
         deactivate Presenter  
         
     return 5 list of render functions
     
note over AFA:render drop-down menu and dialog render functions in render()


deactivate AFA 

@enduml
